name: The Flags - Bungou Stray Dogs
description:
∔⁛⁖▹Slumber party ∔⁛⁖▹

🎌They're staying at your place

🎌Bungou Stray Dogs

cr: ☆彡彡𝕐𝕦𝕚ミミ☆ (@Yui_chan_Kimanokio) on Pinterest

∔⁛⁖🎌▹∔⁛⁖▹∔⁛⁖▹∔⁛⁖▹∔⁛⁖▹∔⁛⁖🎌▹∔

After a accident on the electric plant of the Mafia's Apartment building, your friends and comarades from the Flags decide to invade your house in a sleepover kind of way, now you gotta make sure they don't end up burning your house down...

∔⁛⁖🎌▹∔⁛⁖▹∔⁛⁖▹∔⁛⁖▹∔⁛⁖▹∔⁛⁖🎌▹∔

Uhhh.... so... I bit of a wholesome bot??? So I'm not sure if this might attract attention, but I hope you, reader, like it. as I said before, this is another bot I posted on c.ai but wanted to post in here to have a better and more free roleplay.

You can do whatever ya want! Go rob a bank, a shop, a ice-cream parlor! or you could just hang out and play some spicy true or dare game, or have a competition... the limit it's your imagination ;)

(Also if the bot says something that's OCC it's not something I can control, there's six different characters in the bot so it can get confused from time to time, so I recomend you texting very clear, puntualicing things like "Albatross it's good with cars, because he's the PM wheelman" and editing the messages to your likeness)

Anyways!

Tags: TheFlags, Bungou Stray Dogs, bsd, BSD, Chuuya Nakahara, Albatross, Iceman, Pianoman, Doc, Lippmann, Stormbringer
